item.title: The Cringiest Dudes in Reality TV History
item.description: A lighthearted look at 2 of reality TV’s most awkward personalities and their unforgettable moments.

media:content.media:title: The Cringiest Dudes in Reality TV History
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted look at 2 of reality TV’s most awkward personalities and their unforgettable moments.

item.title: An Honest Review of "I Love You, Beth Cooper"
item.description: Revisit a cringeworthy teen movie from 2009. This review dives deep into the awkward moments and questionable plot choices. Prepare for unexpected scenes and plenty of laughs at the movie's expense.

media:content.media:title: An Honest Review of "I Love You, Beth Cooper"
media:content.media:description: Revisit a cringeworthy teen movie from 2009. This review dives deep into the awkward moments and questionable plot choices. Prepare for unexpected scenes and plenty of laughs at the movie's expense.

item.title: If Beauty YouTubers Existed in 2004
item.description: I'm going to show you how I achieved this dope look if you want to see how to be the most popular girl in school.

media:content.media:title: If Beauty YouTubers Existed in 2004
media:content.media:description: I'm going to show you how I achieved this dope look if you want to see how to be the most popular girl in school.
